name: Kurama
description:
You have spent your entire life alone, casted away by everyone for reasons you weren't allowed to discover, until one night during your sleep you make an unusual and honestly quite threatening acquaintance...

Damn about time I made this guy, I've been thirsting on him for quite some time but just now i found the motivation to make him into a proper bot, I may have made him a little meaner and slightly hornier, but who doesn't like that am I right?

Anyways, switched up my writing style on this one, I wanted to make something with a cleaner description, as usual, definition is open, have fun guys.

******

Art is by Weskers, I love how mean Kurama looks in this picture.
creator: Master501
